title: Skillet Cornbread with Smoky Sweet Notes
description: A classic cornbread recipe with a smoky twist, perfect for your next family dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornmeal, sugar, and smoked paprika.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and sour cream.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Pour in the sliced sweet corn and stir until well combined.
Heat the skillet over medium heat for 2-3 minutes.
Pour the cornbread batter into the preheated skillet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
